name: life-personal
description: Personal Jekyll site, password-protected with StatiCrypt for production.

scripts.build: bash scripts/with-ruby.sh bundle exec jekyll build
scripts.build:protected: npm run build && npm run encrypt
scripts.preview:protected: npm run build:protected && cd _site && python3 -m http.server 4001
scripts.doctor: bash scripts/with-ruby.sh bash -c 'echo PATH=$PATH; echo; which ruby; ruby -v; which bundle; bundle -v'
